_instructions: Fill in every field below before running the scaffold prompt. Leave a field as an empty string ("") or null ONLY if that data truly doesn't exist yet — Claude Code will flag those as TODOs in MISSING_DATA.md rather than invent values. Do not run the standalone scaffold prompt until client_slug, template, practice.name, and booking_link are filled in at minimum.
_scaffold_command: To scaffold a new client site, run: npx tsx scripts/scaffold-client.ts
